description: Defects deliberately planted in data/andigi/draft-spec.json. Detection recall = how many of these a run actually caught, and through which channel. Lives outside data/andigi so it is never ingested as evidence and never trips the drift snapshot.

planted_defects.title: Hedge word 'should' in R2's disbursement promise
R3 traces to zero source claims (invented obligation, no provenance)
R5 prescribes Redis as an untagged implementation choice
CEO's no-human auto-approval contradicts published policy 4.1
48h payout promise vs code SLA 120h and DB default 5 days
'Circular 14/2026' does not exist — invented regulation must be a P0
Policy-4.1 contradiction surfaced as a graded finding for a human ruling
Vague payout wording flagged by the grader as untestable (D5)
Artifact-state reality (5-day payout) raised against the 48h promise
